name: Brother Kairos

sheet.name: Brother Kairos
sheet.background_story: Once a devout monk named Kairos, he grew disillusioned with the monastery's rigid teachings and hypocrisy. Seeking freedom, he joined the Darklade Guild, becoming known as Brother Kairos. With his monk training, he excelled as a cunning bandit, using his skills for infiltration and strategy. Though he found purpose among the outlaws, a part of him still longed for the peace he once sought in his former life.

description: Once a devout monk named Kairos, he grew disillusioned with the monastery's rigid teachings and hypocrisy. Seeking freedom, he joined the Darklade Guild, becoming known as Brother Kairos. With his monk training, he excelled as a cunning bandit, using his skills for infiltration and strategy. Though he found purpose among the outlaws, a part of him still longed for the peace he once sought in his former life.
